name: supermarket-bolivia-erp
description: Espacio de trabajo raíz para el ERP SuperMarket Bolivia S.A.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix microservices/ms-gateway install && npm --prefix microservices/ms-sales install && npm --prefix microservices/ms-customer install && npm --prefix microservices/ms-inventory install && npm --prefix microservices/ms-product install && npm --prefix microservices/ms-notification install && npm --prefix microservices/ms-company install && npm --prefix apps/web-admin install
scripts.dev:all: npm run infra:up && concurrently -k -p "[{name}]" -n "GATEWAY,SALES,CUSTOMER,INVENTORY,PRODUCT,NOTIFICATION,COMPANY,FRONTEND" -c "magenta,cyan,blue,green,yellow,red,gray,white" "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:sales" "npm run start:customer" "npm run start:inventory" "npm run start:product" "npm run start:notification" "npm run start:company" "npm run start:frontend"
